<?php /** * This file has been @generated by a phing task by {@link GeneratePhonePrefixData}. * See [README.md](README.md#generating-data) for more information. * * Pull requests changing data in these files will not be accepted. See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 96121 => 'Beirut', 96124 => 'Metn', 96125 => 'Chouf', 96126 => 'North Lebanon', 96127 => 'South Lebanon', 96128 => 'Bekaa', 96129 => 'Jbeil & Keserwan', ];
